comments.body: Can you add another commit on top bumping the version to v1.8-dev? Just to be sure nothing comes in between by accident? Besides that, LGTM :)

:pushpin: Commit d40a8ec has been approved by `rhatdan`

@vrothberg we use a little script to spin this up and I've not had luck doing the two commits at once with this.  However, I will spin a new commit up shortly for dev and will be watching the PR's coming in with a soft hold in between.
Of all the PR's to fail with a registry flake.
@rhatdan the bot's ignoring me, can you try to rekick please?
